mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A monthly decline in the unemployment rate signals stronger labor market conditions, increasing corporate profit margins and consumer spending, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where UNRATE declines by >0.2pp over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in residential construction (HOUST) and real retail sales (RSAFS) indicates strong consumer demand, leading to elevated corporate earnings expectations and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are negative in 50%+ of periods when both HOUST and RSAFS show positive momentum.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly increase in industrial production (INDPRO) above its 3-month moving average signals improving manufacturing activity, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in 60%+ of instances where INDPRO increases by >0.5% over 1 month.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly core inflation reading (CPIAUCSL) above 2.5% triggers central bank hawkishness, leading to higher real interest rates that depress equity valuations and produce negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A quarterly GDP growth (GDPC1) above 3% indicates strong macroeconomic momentum, which drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days through improved corporate earnings outlook.
failure_condition: 60d forward returns are negative in 50%+ of periods when GDPC1 grows by >3% YoY.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly payroll gain (PAYEMS) above 200k combined with a declining unemployment rate (UNRATE) signals robust labor market health, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: 20d forward returns are negative in 50%+ of instances when PAYEMS > 200k and UNRATE declines.

mechanism_narrative: A tightening monetary policy regime (FEDFUNDS > 4%) combined with rising inflation (CPIAUCSL > 2.5%) creates a 'stagflation' risk environment, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in 60%+ of instances where both FEDFUNDS > 4% and CPIAUCSL > 2.5%.
